title: Resource Details

fields.label: Category
fields.name: resource_category
fields.instructions: The 3 categories are fixed — taken verbatim from the existing (currently ‘Coming soon’) copy on the live Resources page (984). Do not add categories here without also updating the page's own card copy and [iep_resource_grid]'s grouping logic.

fields.label: File
fields.name: resource_file
fields.instructions: The downloadable asset (PDF expected, but not restricted to PDF — no real asset has been provided yet to confirm format). Return format: array (needs url + filename for the download link/attribute).

fields.label: Summary
fields.name: summary
fields.instructions: One-line description of the resource, in the same voice as the existing card copy (e.g. “In-depth guidance on energy efficiency and decarbonisation.”). Do not invent placeholder summaries — leave blank until real content exists.

fields.label: Gated (requires email)
fields.name: gated
fields.instructions: Flags whether this resource should sit behind an email-capture gate. This field only stores the flag — no MC4WP enforcement logic is wired up by this package. CRN-001 lists newsletter/email-capture implementation as an explicitly open decision; building real gating now would mean guessing at that decision. Default off (direct download) until Mission Control confirms the gating approach.

fields.label: Display Order
fields.name: display_order
fields.instructions: Controls presentation order within a category in [iep_resource_grid].

description: CMS-009 deployment package — field model for cspt-resource, a brand-new CPT (no legacy cspt-resource/cspt-download type exists on this site — confirmed via wp_get_post_types before building this package). Post title = resource title (e.g. “Energy Efficiency Quick-Start Guide”), matching every prior module's use of post title for the primary real-world label. Package phase only: ships with zero real resources, since no client-provided guides/whitepapers/calculators/funding content exists anywhere in the repository's reviewed sources — see DECISIONS.md. Grid/wall display only, no individual detail pages (a downloadable resource has no narrative content of its own to read on a dedicated page, same reasoning as Testimonials).
